message:
fix(sync): fix Notify lost-notification bug and pool cancellation leak

notify.rs: Fix a spurious wakeup / lost-notification race. When a
notified waiter is cancelled, it now checks if the global generation
changed (indicating a notify_waiters broadcast) in addition to checking
the waiter's own generation. If either changed, the cancelled event must
not be converted to a stored token. This prevents the scenario where
notify_one followed by notify_waiters causes a future waiter to receive
a stale stored notification.

notify_bug_test.rs: Simplify the regression test to assert the correct
behavior: fut1 ready, fut2 ready (from notify_waiters), fut3 NOT ready
(no stale stored notification leaks through).

pool.rs: WaitForNotification future now carries a Cx reference and
checks cx.checkpoint() at the start of each poll. If cancelled, it
returns Ready(()) immediately, preventing cancelled pool waiters from
blocking indefinitely.

watch.rs / broadcast.rs: Make value discard explicit via
std::mem::replace (watch) and let _popped (broadcast) instead of
silently dropping old values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
